name: Tuna Fish Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and dice the potatoes and carrots.
2. Cook the diced potatoes and carrots in water until they are done.
3. Drain the cooked vegetables.
4. Add the canned tuna and peas to the cooked vegetables.
5. Pour the mixture into a baking dish.
6. Cover with refrigerated biscuits.
7. Bake in an oven set to 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 to 30 minutes.
